sections.instruction: For Questions 1-3, choose the correct letter A, B or C. For Questions 4-10, complete the notes below. Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS AND/ OR A NUMBER for each answer.

questions.content: How long is the heated pool?
Which of these is free for all members?
Which of these does the woman need to book?

sections.instruction: For Questions 11-16, complete the flow chart below using the given options. For Questions 17-18 and 19-20, choose TWO letters A-E.

questions.content: Complete the flow chart below using the given options.
Which TWO characteristics apply to the bamboo oven?
options: A it is suitable for windy weather
B the fire is lit below the bottom end of the bamboo
C the bamboo is cut into equal lengths
D the oven hangs from a stick
E it cooks food by steaming it

questions.content: Which TWO pieces of advice does the speaker give about eating wild fungi?
options: A cooking does not make poisonous fungi edible
B edible wild fungi can be eaten without cooking
C wild fungi are highly nutritious
D some edible fungi look very similar to poisonous varieties
E fungi which cannot be identified should only be eaten in small quantities

sections.instruction: Complete the notes below. Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS AND/ OR A NUMBER for each answer.
For Questions 31-34, complete the flow chart below. Write ONE WORD only for each answer. For Questions 35-40, choose the correct letter A, B or C.

questions.content: Which pie chart shows the percentage of respondents who experienced a problem in the supermarket?
How might the students’ website help the supermarket, according to the manager?
options: A it would support the expansion of the company
B it would allow the identification of problem areas
C it would make the company appear more professional

questions.content: The student says one problem is that some customers
options: A do not have computer skills
B do not have their own computer
C do not have access to a computer

questions.content: Further observation of website use is necessary because of
options: A the small size of the sample
B the need to evaluate the objectives
C the unrepresentative nature of the respondents

questions.content: One positive result of the website for the supermarket staff could be
options: B less chance of unfair complaints
